title: James R. Clapper: Media Interviews on President Trump's Leadership
summary: Former National Intelligence Director James Clapper, a Belfer Center Senior Fellow, was interviewed by a number of media outlets during the summer 2017 about President Trump and his leadership. A few of those interviews are included here.
body: A Sampling of Media Interviews with James R. Clapper The latest from Belfer See more Former National Intelligence Director James Clapper, a Belfer Center Senior Fellow, was interviewed by a number of media outlets during late spring and summer of 2017 about President Trump's leadership style and statements. A sampling of those interviews: Intel chief sheds light on 'beautiful letter' Trump says he ... - CNN.com (Aug. 25, 2017) Clapper's full interview on Trump's rally - CNN Video - CNN.com ▶ 8:04 (August 23, 2017) James Clapper: Concerned by 'Jekyll Hyde' Trump pattern - CNNPolitics (August 23, 2017) Clapper questions Trump's fitness to hold office - CNN Video - CNN.com (August 23, 2017) James Clapper, ex-intel chief, warns Trump against firing ... - CNN.com (August 3, 2017) James Clapper's full interview on CNN - CNN Video - CNN.com ▶ 5:45 (July 29, 2017) Clapper: US institutions 'under assault' from Trump - CNNPolitics (May 15, 2017) James R. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: In a series of media interviews conducted in the spring and summer of 2017, former U.S. Director of National Intelligence James R. Clapper, a Senior Fellow at the Belfer Center, provided critical commentary on President Donald Trump's leadership. Clapper expressed deep concern over what he described as a 'Jekyll and Hyde' pattern in Trump's behavior, questioning the President's fitness for office. He warned that core U.S. institutions were 'under assault' from the President's actions and statements, highlighting a perceived erosion of democratic norms. Clapper specifically cautioned against Trump firing key intelligence officials, framing such actions as threats to the independence and integrity of the intelligence community. These interviews, primarily with CNN, captured a senior intelligence veteran's alarm over a presidency he viewed as destabilizing to governance and national security protocols.
result.main_content_zh: 2017年春夏季，美国前国家情报总监、贝尔弗中心高级研究员詹姆斯·R·克拉珀在一系列媒体采访中，对时任总统特朗普的领导力提出了尖锐批评。克拉珀表达了对特朗普行为中他所描述的“杰基尔与海德”式反复无常模式的深切担忧，并质疑总统是否适合担任公职。他警告称，美国的核心制度正受到总统言行“攻击”，强调了民主规范遭受侵蚀的认知。克拉珀特别告诫特朗普不要解雇关键情报官员，认为此类行为威胁到情报界的独立性与完整性。这些主要由CNN进行的采访，记录了一位资深情报专家对一届被他视为破坏治理稳定和国家安全规程的总统任期的警示。
